name: Critical Public Variable Without Final Modifier
description: A critical public variable is not declared final, allowing any function with access to the class to modify it to unexpected values. This can violate assumptions that other parts of the program rely upon, leading to integrity and confidentiality violations.
detection_pattern: STORAGE(public_field) without final/const modifier that holds critical data. Look for STORAGE(public_mutable)→EXTERNAL(any_caller) where the field can be modified via TRANSFORM(assignment) without AUTH(setter_validation).
